title: fix: route dedicated audio models through /v1/audio/speech in Play page
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Music to our ears
gist.blurb: Fixed a bug where dedicated audio models were getting lost on their way to the Play page. The tunes are back and routing perfectly.
gist.summary: Corrected API routing in the Play page so dedicated audio models use the proper speech endpoint instead of the chat completions endpoint.
gist.impact: Generating music and text-to-speech from the Play page works flawlessly again without 'model not found' errors.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes audio routing (music/speech) on the Play page. Visual symbols: headphones, musical notes, audio cables, a retro boombox or DJ setup. Characters: Polly the bee wearing headphones, plugging in an audio cable to fix the 'routing'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, plugging a glowing audio cable into a chunky retro boombox. Colorful musical notes float in the air. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
